api.name: getSpend
api.description: Get current LLM spending — today's cost, monthly cost, and remaining budget.

api.name: getCacheStats
api.description: Get cache hit/miss statistics and estimated cost savings.

api.name: getAnalytics
api.description: Get usage analytics: total requests, latency percentiles, error rate, and cost breakdown.

api.name: getProviderStatus
api.description: Check health status of all configured LLM providers.

api.name: testPII
api.description: Test a text string for PII detection without sending to any LLM.

manifest.description_for_human: LLM infrastructure suite — cost caps, caching, rate limiting, PII redaction, smart routing, and analytics.
manifest.description_for_model: Query Stockyard for LLM cost tracking, cache stats, analytics, provider health, and PII detection. Stockyard is a proxy that sits between LobeChat and LLM providers.

settings.name: proxyUrl
settings.label: Stockyard Proxy URL
settings.description: Base URL of your Stockyard proxy

meta.title: Stockyard
meta.description: Cost caps, caching, and analytics for your LLM calls
